action.reasoning: Observation: Pipeline works but val_pred only has 50 preds (used --limit 50) while eval has 312 labels - so 262 are missing, hence 0/312. Need to confirm baseline accuracy on actual generated 50. Looking at outputs, the model produces small reasonable bboxes - but my eval includes ALL 312 labels, not just the 50 predicted. Analysis: I need to (1) eval only the 50 predicted to get true baseline, or (2) run on full val. Time was 135s for 50 samples = 2.7s/sample. Full val 312 ≈ 14min. Test set is similar size. Decision: Run full val, then assess baseline. If baseline is decent, finetune; otherwise try better prompting first. Let me also fix eval to only count predicted IDs.
action.command: python predict.py --data_path val_data --checkpoint /data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct --output val_pred.json && python eval_val.py
